mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_search_record (userId, keyword, type, searchTime) VALUES (#{record.userId}, #{record.keyword}, #{record.type}, #{record.searchTime})

INSERT INTO user_search_record (userId, keyword, type, searchTime, createTime, updateTime) VALUES
(#{record.userId}, #{record.keyword}, #{record.type}, #{record.searchTime}, #{record.createTime}, #{record.updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_search_record SET isDelete = 1 WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isDelete = 0
